title: Blood N Bunch
description: This is a modpack based on the 1.6.4 modpack [Blood N Bones Classic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/blood-n-bones).
body:
# ![BLOOD N BUNCH](https://previews.dropbox.com/p/thumb/ACGaKv4OefWJ-bjSWa986AxSdFX8a0hH2DL19Ohqlp-HPYmsQ2W5cIJlxy6fAy1ymunW3oAlFFokQs8G7v5nrmB_yMqlAWHvjZM37wZvLJ1-LGJCP9nHjWScBJinKbdCNqxlOQivTEsyf2XhT5Ny3xspeMxyVY2u2OyXLSrlvjhp-xRgKKa3OdM0hU--1MjoOlUewqrzN4cbI2FCGLu-0MUsWrIK3Wz4V3p0yTZx6X0A0usO6KMS8-BBehj7Hr8H1Dcee7j8CswrFjejohVDrVTVePFxcwA02W8js2LAKZTrzhvvxytauOavDVZJPc1wrBnCKjgxw-FV388yyiPdPVKJ/p.png)
This is a modpack inspired by the 2015 mod [Blood N Bones Classic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/blood-n-bones). This modpack**Blood N Bones** is normally called **The hardest Modpack Ever**. 

This Modpack also is kind of like [RLCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/rlcraft).

----  # This modpack is using CurseForge Modpack,  
like [No Tree Punching](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-tree-punching), [Ambiance](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ambience-music-mod), [Ice And fire ROTN](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-rotn-edition),[Bauble](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles), [Jade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade),[Hardcore Darkness](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hardcore-darkness), [StalkerCreepers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stalker-creepers), [TenshiLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tenshilib), [ToughAsNails](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tough-as-nails), [InfernalMobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/infernal-mobs),[IguanaTweaksReborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iguanatweaks-reborn),  [ImprovedMobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/improved-mobs), [Tesla Core Lib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tesla-core-lib), [ShadowFact's ForgeLN](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shadowfacts-forgelin/),and [CodeChickenLib 8+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/codechicken-lib-1-8/files/2779848)


If you want to contact me or just have a good time please join the my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/VsMKx8X6Xb)
